narrative:
Precinct Otway/Brush Creek (precinct in Scioto County) has 700 registered voters, with 53.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 29.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a pronounced Republican lean of 12.3 percentage points.
